creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Tested on two other computers that had the same problem, using:

% pkg delete -f gstreamer1-plugins-bad-1.12.3_2
% portmaster -C gstreamer1

And, it worked great!

However, with one note:

Using:

% portmaster -C gstreamer1 gstreamer1-plugins-bad

fails, reporting gstreamer1-plugins-bad not installed or something like that.

and after running

% portmaster -C gstreamer1

it seems to install gstreamer1-plugins-bad anyways
